metadata.title: Givernance — Infrastructure for European nonprofits
metadata.description: The operational infrastructure European nonprofits use to run fundraising, donor stewardship, grants and reporting — GDPR-native, no lock-in.
metadata.ogDescription: One platform for fundraising, donor stewardship, grants, volunteers and reporting. Built with Swiss and French nonprofits.
metadata.pricingDescription: Transparent, per-organisation pricing for European nonprofits. No per-seat tax, AI included, GDPR-native. Starter, Organization and Scale plans — billed monthly or annually.
metadata.pricingOgTitle: Givernance pricing — built for nonprofit budgets
metadata.pricingOgDescription: Per-organisation pricing with unlimited users, AI included and no consultant tax. Lock in launch pricing as a Founding Partner.

titleAccents: Own your data, end to end.
hero.body: Givernance is the operational layer European nonprofits use to run fundraising, donor stewardship, grants and reporting — in one place, without consultants and without lock-in.
hero.replyNote: Reply within 1 business day · No commitment · Free

principles.title: Four commitments to the sector.
principles.body: Givernance is built around what European nonprofits actually need to mobilise, track and report their resources — not what a generic SaaS CRM finds convenient to ship.

items.title: GDPR-native
items.body: Consent, auditability and privacy controls are built into the data model — not bolted on as a settings page.

items.title: Postal + digital
items.body: Print campaigns, QR-attributed mailings and online donations live in one ledger. The channels European nonprofits actually use.

items.title: Human-controlled AI
items.body: AI proposes and explains. Your team confirms what matters. No irreversible action without human approval.

items.title: Data sovereignty
items.body: Hosted in Europe. Exportable in full, any time. No lock-in, no consultant fees to leave.

whyChange.titleLead: You chose a big-name platform for the free seats.
statusQuo: Licence costs that rise every time the team grows
Consultant dependency for the simplest change
A US-centric data model retrofitted to European realities
withGivernance: Predictable pricing designed for nonprofit budgets
GDPR built into the core, with full audit trail
Self-service workflows your team owns end-to-end
European-first model: postal, banking, fiscalité, languages

product.body: Givernance starts with the donor lifecycle — who gives, how much, and why — then connects campaigns, grants, volunteers and reporting around that relationship.

modules.title: Postal campaigns
modules.body: Personalised letters, merge fields and print-ready PDFs — the workflow your team already runs, finally on rails.

modules.title: QR attribution
modules.body: Every mailing carries a unique QR so you know which envelope drove which gift.

modules.title: Online giving
modules.body: Branded donation pages and embeddable widgets, live in minutes. Powered by your own Stripe account.

modules.title: Grants
modules.body: Applications, deadlines, tranches and funder reporting in one place, with restricted-fund logic built in.

modules.title: Volunteers
modules.body: Shifts, hours, background checks and recognition, alongside your constituent records.

modules.title: Impact reporting
modules.body: Connect outcomes to fundraising and operations data. The report your board asks for, without a spreadsheet marathon.

modules.title: Finance handoff
modules.body: Export journal entries and fund balances to your accounting system — no double-entry, no reconciliation gymnastics.

product.ledgerTitle: One ledger, one source of truth.
product.ledgerBody: Every module shares the same donor and constituent record. No imports, no sync jobs, no reconciliation.

ai.body: Duplicate detection, data clean-up, suggested next steps — AI handles repetitive work so your team can focus on relationships. Every decision is logged and auditable.
ai.footnote: No irreversible action without your confirmation. Every AI decision is logged, attributable, and auditable.

modes.name: Manual
modes.body: Full human control. The AI stays out of the way.

modes.name: Assisted
modes.body: Default mode. AI proposes and explains — your team decides.

modes.name: Autopilot
modes.body: For routine work you trust to run automatically, with clear exceptions and full audit trails.

pilots.body: Givernance is being developed with a group of pilot organisations in Switzerland and France. Pricing will be transparent, predictable, and designed for nonprofit budgets — no surprises, no per-seat traps.

cta.titleLead: Ready to see what purpose-built nonprofit software
cta.body: Book a 30-minute demo tailored to your organisation — covering donor management, postal & digital campaigns, compliance, and AI-assisted workflows.
cta.replyNote: Reply within 1 business day · No commitment

footer.tagline: Operational infrastructure for European nonprofits. Mobilise, track and report your resources — without consultants, without lock-in.
footer.copyright: Built for the European nonprofit sector

actions: Reallocate budget to top-performing mail pack
dashboard.ariaLabel: Live Givernance dashboard showing a postal spring appeal campaign with rising daily donations, three suggested AI actions, and a 4.8× campaign ROI.

demo.heading: See Givernance in action
demo.description: A 30-minute on-screen walkthrough tailored to your organisation — no slides, just the product. We'll show you exactly how Givernance fits your donor management, postal campaigns, and GDPR workflow.
demo.point1: Live demo of the full product
demo.point2: Tailored to your team size and context
demo.formDescription: Fill in the form and we'll reach out to schedule a time.
demo.footerNote: We'll reply within 1 business day. No spam, ever.
demo.successTitle: Thank you — we'll be in touch within 1 business day.
demo.successDescription: We've received your request and will reach out to schedule your demo.
demo.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pricing.title: Pricing built for nonprofit budgets, not seat counts.
pricing.body: One price per organisation — volunteers, interns and board members included. AI, GDPR compliance and onboarding come built in. No per-seat tax, no consultant fees, no surprises.
pricing.launchNote: Launch pricing — lock it in for 24 months as a Founding Partner.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.tagline: For small nonprofits finding their rhythm.
tiers.audience: Run professional fundraising without a CRM consultant.

tiers.name: Organization
tiers.tagline: For established nonprofits running multiple campaigns.
tiers.audience: The plan most organisations will live in.

features.label: Grants module — applications, deadlines, restricted funds
Impact reporting — outcomes linked to fundraising

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.audience: Complex requirements, multiple entities, or 50,000+ constituents.

features.label: SSO — SAML / OIDC with your identity provider

matrix.title: What's included where
matrix.body: Every plan ships with the GDPR-native core. Higher plans add capacity, automation and support.
matrix.soonNote: Items marked ‘2026’ are on the public roadmap, planned for late 2026, and not yet generally available.

founding.title: Shape the platform. Lock in half price.
founding.body: Instead of a fleeting discount, we're inviting the first 50 organisations into a real partnership. Founding Partners get half price for two years — and a direct line to the people building Givernance.
founding.spotsLabel: Limited to the first 50 organisations on an annual plan
commit: Permission to feature you as a case study (anonymised if you prefer)
perks: 50% off for 24 months — locked, not declining
A direct channel with the product team
Price-lock guarantee — your rate never increases by surprise

comparison.title: One platform that replaces a stack of tools.
comparison.body: Competitors charge per seat, gate AI behind add-ons and bill migration as consulting. Givernance bundles the operational workflow and prices it per organisation.

items.a: Never. Givernance is priced per organisation. Staff, volunteers, interns and board members all get access at no extra cost — eliminating the #1 reason CRM bills spiral.

items.q: What happens when we outgrow a plan?
items.a: Nothing breaks. You'll see a friendly heads-up as you approach a limit, and imports pause only at 105% — read access to your data is always maintained. We never delete data and never spring a surprise charge.
Onboarding is included, and CSV/Excel import ships on every plan. A dedicated Salesforce NPSP migration tool is on the 2026 roadmap for Organization and Scale.

items.q: Is our data GDPR-compliant and hosted in Europe?
items.a: Yes. Consent, audit trail and subject-access exports are built into the data model, and all hosting is in the EU. Scale customers can also self-host in the region of their choice.
Both. Monthly gives you flexibility; annual saves roughly 20%. There's no penalty for monthly — the annual price simply rewards the commitment.
Givernance is in early access with pilot organisations in Switzerland and France. Book a demo to see the product and, if it fits, claim one of the 50 Founding Partner places.

cta.title: Ready to put a number on your mission?
cta.body: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll walk through the plan that fits your organisation and, if you're among the first 50, lock in Founding Partner pricing.
cta.replyNote: Reply within 1 business day · No commitment
